case_title: PEREZ, LISA vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF CONTROL et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF CONTROL DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-17-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-16-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-27-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-17-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-17-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR AUG-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-16-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-16-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC: WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-01-1995 CONTINUED FROM AUG-16-1995 TO SEP-15-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-15-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-15-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: TOTAL OF $150.00 SANCTIONS NOW DUE. IF NO GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL BE DISMISSING CASE ON 10/16/95., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-10-1995 CONTINUED FROM SEP-15-1995 TO OCT-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-16-1995, DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SECTIONS 581(D) AND 581(M) OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY CO. -VS- SUPERIOR COURT, (1995) 36 CAL.APP.4TH 678.
